title: tithymalus biglandulosus
intro: Tithymalus biglandulosus, also known as Euphorbia biglandulosa, is a species of plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It is a succulent shrub native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in latex, which contains anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and accelerated wound healing. Tithymalus biglandulosus is often used in herbal preparations, including ointments, salves, and tinctures, to promote skin health and treat various skin issues.
